title: Golden Glistening Syrian Flaky Pastry Bowl
description: A savory, flaky, brunch-mood Syrian dish featuring strong wholemeal flour, perfect for a low-carb-friendly breakfast or snack. Serve in a beautiful lacquerware bowl for a stunning presentation.

ingredients.name: wholemeal flour
ingredients.notes: use a strong wholemeal flour for the best flavor

instructions: Combine wholemeal flour, salted butter, and water in a large mixing bowl until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Use a rolling pin to flatten each ball of dough into a thin circle.
Place a spoonful of plain yogurt in the center of each dough circle.
Sprinkle chopped fresh parsley and chopped fresh mint over the yogurt.
Fold the dough in half over the filling and press the edges together to seal the pastry.
Brush the tops of the pastries with a little bit of water and sprinkle with black pepper.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and cook the pastries for 4-5 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Serve the pastries hot in a beautiful lacquerware bowl.
Garnish with additional chopped fresh parsley and a dollop of plain yogurt, if desired.
